channel.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Standalone Tools

  • protonenvstars1 - Simple Proton version and prefix management.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Trading

  • steam-inventory-api-ngstars1 - A Steam Inventory API wrapper with advanced features such as retries and proxy support.

    • Packages

    Misc

  • steamapisstars4 - Module to use the API of steamapis.com.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Trading

  • steam-inventory-streamstars8 - Fetch inventories as readable streams.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Sep 16th - Sep 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Java

  • JavaSteamstars51 - Java library that provides an interface to directly interact with Valve's Steam servers.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Ruby

  • steam-tradestars8 - Ruby gem for sending trade offers.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

General

  • Steam-Tradestars15 - An asynchronous, event-based trade library.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Oct 30th - Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

WebAPI

  • steamapistars84 - A nice Steam API wrapper.

    • Packages

    General

  • SteamKit2stars1.8k - .NET library designed to interoperate with Valve's Steam network.
  • SteamAuthstars188 - A C# library that provides vital Steam Mobile Authenticator functionality.
  • SteamBotstars1.2k - Automated bot software for interacting with steam trade.
  • SteamTradeOffersBotstars44 - SteamBot fork which focuses on trade offers.
  • SteamStandardProjectstars2 - A collection of .NET Standard libraries using common types that provide functionality in one or more parts of Steam.

    • Packages

    Misc

  • BackpackLoginstars6 - A .NET Standard library for logging into backpack.tf using Steam credentials.
  • TeamFortressOutpostApistars3 - A .NET Standard class library which allows user to interact with TF2Outpost.
  • SteamGaugesApistars3 - A .NET Standard 2.0 library to automatically use the API of steamgauges.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Sep 4th - Sep 10th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Third-Party Services

  • backpack.tf - Provides TF2 prices and Steam market/inventory related services.
  • steamanalyst.com - Provides CS:GO prices.
  • steamapi.io - Provides prices for several games and Steam market/inventory related services.
  • steamapis.com - Provides prices for several games and Steam market/inventory related services.
  • steamlytics.xyz - Provides CS:GO prices and Steam market/inventory related services.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

Game Interaction

  • csgostars83 - Python module for interacting with CSGO's Game Coordinator.
  • dota2stars131 - Python module for interacting with Dota 2's Game Coordinator.

    • Packages

    Misc

  • vpkstars83 - Python module for working with Valve's Pack format.
  • vdfstars81 - Python module for working with Valve's KeyValue format.

    • Packages

    General

  • SteamAPIstars403 - An object-oriented Python 2.7+ library for accessing the Steam Web API.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • In-depth Steam Bot Guide with Node.jsstars434

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Jun 12th - Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

PHP

  • steam-authstars13 - An alternative Steam authentication library with Composer support.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

Authentication

  • steam-loginstars47 - Simple Connect / Express Steam authentication library.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Game Interaction

  • steam-gameserverstars10 - Steam client handler for Gameserver and AnonGameserver account types.

    • Packages

    PHP

  • steam-apistars78 - A PHP wrapper for the Steam API.
  • steamidstars4 - SteamID class for PHP.
  • steam-totpstars16 - PHP library to deal with Steam's proprietary TOTP algorithm.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Packages

General

  • steampystars224 - Fully automated Steam trade offers library with SteamGuard support.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Charred's node.js Guide to Steam Botsstars46
  • Retrieving 2FA Keys from iOS Device

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

General

  • Steam as OpenID Provider
  • Steam API Key Registration

    • Resources

    Posts

  • Item IDs Explained
  • Everything Related to Escrow
  • Understanding Avatar Hash

    • Packages

    WebAPI

  • steam-webapistars13 - Complete WebAPI wrapper with support for extra HTTP headers sent by Steam.

item.title: scholtzm/awesome-steam May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Discussion Boards

  • /r/SteamBot Discord
  • node-steam-forumstars43
  • /r/SteamBot
  • /r/nodesteam
  • DoctorMcKay's Dev Forum

    • Packages

    PHP

  • SteamAuthenticationstars405 - Steam OpenID authentication with PHP.
  • SteamAuthOOPstars26 - An object-oriented alternative to SteamAuthentication.
  • SteamCommunitystars63 - A PHP library for interacting with the Steam Community website.

    • Resources

    Standalone Tools

  • SteamDesktopAuthenticatorstars1.6k - Desktop implementation of Steam's mobile authenticator app.
  • steam-auth-web-util - Generate 2FA codes directly in your web browser.
  • NetHook2 - Intercept Steam client's network messages.
  • NetHook2 Analyzer - Inspect messages dumped by NetHook2.

    • Packages

    Objective-C

  • SteamAuthstars5 - An iOS wrapper around Steam's OpenID login.

    • Resources

    General

  • Steam Error Codes - List of EResult codes with possible explanations.
  • Steam WebAPI @ ValveSoftware
  • Steam WebAPI @ TF2 Wiki
  • Steam WebAPI Documentation by xpaw

    • Packages

    General

  • steamstars985 - Interface directly with Steam servers from Node.js.
  • steam-clientstars43 - API-compatible fork of node-steam's SteamClient.
  • steam-userstars441 - Feature-rich easy-to-use Steam client.
  • vaporstars105 - Lightweight Steam client framework.
  • steam-parentbotstars33 - Simple base class for a Steam bot.
  • steamstars503 - Module for various interactions with Steam.
  • PySteamKit - Python port of SteamKit.
  • steamoddstars66 - Steam tools library.

    • Packages

    Trading

  • steam-tradestars165 - Node.js wrapper around Steam live trading.
  • steam-tradeoffersstars291 - Steam Trade Offers for Node.js.
  • steam-tradeoffer-managerstars338 - Simple and sane Steam trade offer management.

    • Packages

    Game Interaction

  • tf2stars40 - Interact directly with TF2 game coordinator.
  • csgostars372 - Interact directly with CS:GO game coordinator.
  • dota2stars515 - Interact directly with Dota 2 game coordinator.

    • Packages

    Community & Store Automation

  • steamcommunitystars311 - Interact with steamcommunity.com. Also allows to confirm trade offers.
  • steamstorestars48 - Interact with store.steampowered.com.
  • steam-weblogonstars25 - Retrieve SteamCommunity cookies if you are running Steam network client.
  • steam-web-api-keystars18 - Automatically registers and retrieves Steam API key.
  • steam-parentalstars3 - Disable parental lock.

    • Packages

    Authentication

  • passport-steamstars281 - Steam (OpenID) authentication strategy for Passport and Node.js.
  • meteor-accounts-steamstars17 - Steam OpenID integration for Meteor Accounts.

    • Packages

    Misc

  • steam-resourcesstars22 - Steam's enums, protobufs and structs.
  • steam-cryptostars15 - Node.js implementation of Steam crypto.
  • steam-groupsstars16 - Custom node-steam handler which provides group functions.
  • steamidstars50 - SteamID usage and conversion made easy.
  • steam-totpstars158 - Easily generate 2FA codes used by Steam.
  • steam-chat-botstars91 - Simplified interface for a steam chat bot.
  • vdfstars20 - vdf to object and vice versa.
  • steamrepstars10 - Check user's SteamRep reputation.
  • reptfstars2 - Check user's rep.tf reputation.

    • Packages

    Go

  • steamstars265 - Steam's protocol in Go.
  • steam-mobileauthstars14 - Port of SteamAuth in Go.

    • Packages

    C++

  • SteamPPstars85 - C++ library to interoperate with Steam servers.

    • Packages

    Java

  • SteamKit-Javastars44 - Java port of SteamKit.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Creating a Steam Trade Bot with Node.js
